name: G Pen Hydout 510 Cartridge Battery
summary: G Pen Hydout 510 Cartridge Battery — a 510 cartridge battery for patients using 510 cartridges.
description: Engineered to fit most 510-thread cartridges up to 2G, this battery combines a sleek, pocket-sized build with advanced features that appeal to both new and experienced oil cartridge users. (Note: 510 Cartridge & USB-C Cable not included) The G Pen Hydout 510 Cartridge Battery offers a premium, discreet solution for oil cartridge vaping. Stock this model for customers who value portability, performance, and privacy. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
